test-method.name: testLookupPageLoads
test-method.description: TC_LK_P01 – Lookup page loads; location search field and form are visible

test-method.name: testSearchExistingLocation
test-method.description: TC_LK_P02 – Search for the existing test location 'Mumbai'

test-method.name: testLocationFormFieldsVisible
test-method.description: TC_LK_P03 – All location form fields are visible and editable

test-method.name: testAddNewLocationAllFields
test-method.description: TC_LK_P04 – Add a new location with all required fields and save

exception.message:
element click intercepted: Element
...
is not clickable at point (1393, 290). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=149.0.7827.102) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.7' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [bc352165fe4e03ea9e418ccedaf1cc54, clickElement {id=f.C2EF8DC88FC8B74360A50B877C8BA8FE.d.1B507803256DE52124BB510C4AEED729.e.12688}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 149.0.7827.102, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 149.0.7827.115 (daf70f9ddee..., userDataDir: C:\Users\INFINI~1\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:62203}, goog:processID: 13940, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:62203/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 149.0.7827.102, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (bc352165fe4e03ea9e418ccedaf1cc54)] -> xpath: //div[@class='ng-placeholder' and text()='Select State']] Session ID: bc352165fe4e03ea9e418ccedaf1cc54

test-method.name: testSaveLocationWithoutName
test-method.description: TC_LK_N01 – Save location without Location Name; expect validation error

test-method.name: testSaveLocationWithoutAddress
test-method.description: TC_LK_N02 – Save location without Address Line 1; expect validation error

test-method.name: testSaveLocationInvalidZipCode
test-method.description: TC_LK_N03 – Save location with letters in Zip Code; expect validation error

test-method.name: testSearchNonExistentLocation
test-method.description: TC_LK_N04 – Search for non-existent location; expect no results

test-method.name: testInsurancePageLoads
test-method.description: TC_LK_P05 – Insurance page loads; search field and form are visible

test-method.name: testSearchExistingInsurance
test-method.description: TC_LK_P06 – Search for the existing test insurance company

test-method.name: testInsuranceFormFieldsVisible
test-method.description: TC_LK_P07 – All insurance form fields are visible and editable

test-method.name: testAddNewInsuranceAllFields
test-method.description: TC_LK_P08 – Add a new insurance company with all required fields and save

test-method.name: testSaveInsuranceWithoutName
test-method.description: TC_LK_N05 – Save insurance without Company Name; expect validation error

test-method.name: testSaveInsuranceInvalidPhone
test-method.description: TC_LK_N06 – Save insurance with letters in phone number; expect validation error

test-method.name: testSearchNonExistentInsurance
test-method.description: TC_LK_N07 – Search for non-existent insurance; expect no results
